mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM kb_user_label t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbUserLabelEntity.id},'%')
AND t.user_id like concat('%',#{kbUserLabelEntity.userId},'%')
AND t.label_id like concat('%',#{kbUserLabelEntity.labelId},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}
select kml.id as id ,kml.name as name fROM kb_user_label kbu left join kb_model_label kml on kbu.label_id = kml.id where kbu.user_id = #{userId} and kml.is_deleted = 2
select id from kb_user_label where user_id = #{userId}

select count( distinct t3.id) from (select * from kb_user_label where user_id = #{userId}) t1 join kb_basic_label t2 on t1.label_id = t2.l_id join kb_basic t3 on t2.b_id = t3.id where t3.status = 1 and t3.is_deleted=2

select count( distinct t3.id) from (select * from kb_user_label where user_id = #{userId}) t1 join kb_basic_label t2 on t1.label_id = t2.l_id join kb_basic t3 on t2.b_id = t3.id where t3.status = 1 and t3.is_deleted=2 and t3.category_id in ( #{categoryId})
